"[29] CORR***A123-203 VIA LL-- CHK'D 2 1/2 MI JNO ADDR AND UTL ON ANYTHING OVER TEH SIDE // CHK'D GLENDORA RIDGE RD ALSO UTL // JSO ADDR HAS HEAVY FOG, LOW VISIBILITY AND LOTS OF KRAIL // INQ IF AIROPS CAN DO FLYOVER LATER AND ADV -- 98"
"[28] CHK'D 2 1/2 MILES - UTL // ALSO GLENDORA RIDGE RD AND UTL -- AND JSO ADDR LOTS OF KRAIL AND"
"[23] 1039 IN AIROPS WILL ADV DUE TO WEATHER "

"[18] 29 CLR 07 CHEV UT OO VALENCIA // RP ADVS VEH IS GRY CHEV CAM"

"[8] UNK VEH DESC "

"[3] ADV TC OCCD SOMWHERE ON MT BALDY NEAR SWITCHBACKS"
